name: rag-quality-regression-set
description: Regression prompts for grounded answer quality checks

items.question: Can I get a refund after 45 days?
items.expected_answer: No, refunds are only available within 30 days.
items.reference_context: Refunds are available within 30 days for unused products. Contact support with your order ID.

items.question: Do you offer overnight shipping?
items.expected_answer: Express options are available at checkout.
items.reference_context: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express options are available at checkout.

items.question: Is weekend support available?
items.expected_answer: Support is not available on weekends.
items.reference_context: Support hours are Monday to Friday, 9am-6pm Central Time.

items.question: Is MFA required for admin accounts?
items.expected_answer: Yes, MFA is required for admin accounts.
items.reference_context: API keys must be rotated every 90 days. MFA is required for admin accounts.
